items.definition_en: A teacher helps students learn in school.
items.example_en: The teacher started the math lesson.

items.definition_en: A student goes to school to learn.
items.example_en: The student finished his homework.

items.definition_en: A principal is the head of a school.
items.example_en: The principal greeted everyone in the morning.

items.definition_en: A librarian takes care of books in the library.
items.example_en: The librarian helped me find a history book.

items.definition_en: A caretaker keeps the school clean and safe.
items.example_en: The caretaker cleaned the hallway after lunch.

items.definition_en: A coach helps students train in sports.
items.example_en: The coach organized a football game.

items.definition_en: A nurse cares for sick or hurt students.
items.example_en: The nurse gave Anna a bandage.

items.definition_en: A secretary works in the school office.
items.example_en: The secretary answered the phone.

items.definition_en: An assistant teacher helps the main teacher.
items.example_en: The assistant teacher helped in the art class.

items.definition_en: A classmate is someone in your class.
items.example_en: I sat next to my classmate during English.

items.definition_en: A counselor helps students with problems.
items.example_en: The counselor listened to my worries.

items.definition_en: A head teacher is in charge of a class.
items.example_en: The head teacher gave us new books.

items.definition_en: A substitute teacher fills in when the teacher is away.
items.example_en: We had a substitute teacher in math today.

items.definition_en: A supervisor watches students during activities.
items.example_en: The supervisor checked our work in the lab.

items.definition_en: A janitor fixes things and keeps the school tidy.
items.example_en: The janitor repaired the broken door.

items.definition_en: A lunch lady serves food at school.
items.example_en: The lunch lady gave us soup with bread.

items.definition_en: A class monitor helps the teacher with small tasks.
items.example_en: The class monitor collected the homework.

items.definition_en: A school guard protects students and staff.
items.example_en: The school guard stands near the entrance.

items.definition_en: A bus driver drives students to school.
items.example_en: The bus driver waited for us at the stop.

items.definition_en: An administrator helps run the school.
items.example_en: The administrator handled our school forms.
